query:
WITH potential AS (
            SELECT email, operator FROM usr
            UNION
            SELECT email, operator FROM workspace_invite
        ),
        per_user AS (
            SELECT email, bool_and(operator) AS only_operator FROM potential GROUP BY email
        )
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT only_operator) AS "authors!",
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE only_operator) AS "operators!"
        FROM per_user
